title: cochlearia globosa
intro: Cochlearia globosa, also known as spherical or globe chickweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for wound healing and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cochlearia globosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
